# Nobody & The Computer

> Films, music and strange experiments made with artificial intelligence.

Nobody & The Computer is a creative project by an independent artist exploring AI-assisted filmmaking, generative music, and experimental digital art. All work is made by one person using artificial intelligence as a creative collaborator.

## What this site is

- Homepage and project catalog: https://nobody.computer
- AI films: https://nobody.computer/films
- JazzGPT MIDI tool: https://nobody.computer/jazzgpt

## Projects

### JazzGPT MIDI
A tool that converts structured musical prompts into MIDI compositions, combining large language models with symbolic music generation.
- More info: https://nobody.computer/jazzgpt
- Download: https://www.patreon.com/posts/jazzgpt-app-turn-151554600

## Links

- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@nobodyandthecomputer
- Patreon: https://patreon.com/NobodyandTheComputer

## Keywords

AI film, generative cinema, AI music tools, generative art, MIDI generation, LLM music, experimental film, AI creative tools, generative art experiments
